goal: this repo is fresh on this machine - i want make install to run cleanly, there should be some make setup job that will install everything necessary so users don't have to do it - cover mac, rockylinux and debian/ubuntu style

turns.text: this repo is fresh on this machine - i want make install to run cleanly, there should be some make setup job that will install everything necessary so users don't have to do it - cover mac, rockylinux and debian/ubuntu style

expected_effects: Bash: git add scripts/<file> Makefile && git status --short && g completed
Bash: git commit -m <val>EOF' build: add `make setup` to install d completed
Bash: ls -la && cat Makefile 2>/dev/null | head -100 completed
Bash: ls test/e2e; echo <val>; find test/e2e -name <val> -exec cat completed
Bash: tail -n +100 Makefile; echo <val>; head -5 go.mod; echo <val completed
